case_title: ZAINAB ALI-GROESSNER VS. SUSAN M. MAGLEY, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALI-GROESSNER, ZAINAB AS TO DEFENDANT SUSAN M. MAGLEY, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA MAGLEY & ASSOCIATES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
